Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lesser Treasure Hall]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Heaven's Glory School has a Lesser Treasure Hall containing weapons, training supplements, elixirs, and constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 13''' — The Lesser Treasure Hall is a place from which disciples can select items after surviving the Trial of Glorious Ascension.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The Lesser Treasure Hall is one of three treasure halls in the Heaven’s Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The Lesser Treasure Hall has a towering sign with its name in gold letters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The Lesser Treasure Hall is a place where treasures can be chosen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — A Jade Forger lives over the Lesser Treasure Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The Lesser Treasure Hall contains script-activated security constructs hidden in its floors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — The Lesser Treasure Hall has a locked door with security scripts and deadly constructs.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The ruined building was similar in size to the Lesser Treasure Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon suggested speaking in the Lesser Treasure Hall.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
